label: Violet Oath Armory
description: Violet Oath Armory is a slab-walled weapons shop cut into Ashenward City’s basalt frontage, its facade reinforced with slagcrete ribs and a recessed entry to break the ash gales. Interior galleries are lined with lock-frames and rack-rails for autoguns, stubbers, and chain-bladed tools, with sealed cases for void-corrosion oils and hand-loaded cartridges. A constant bruise-colored auroral glow filters through armored clerestory panes, turning oiled steel into hard violet highlights. Shielded vox-check stations and identity slates are built into the counterwork, reflecting the city’s endemic interference and the regulated traffic of arms within its precincts.
